description: Testing the UI elements and layout of the CSV form interface

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check UI of CSV form
- Title
- Layout of items
- State of each items
- Text
expected_result: CSV form is the same with design

description: Testing CSV import functionality including file upload security, file type validation, and import behavior for various file scenarios

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check btn Upload
expected_result: Btn is active when hover mouse

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click btn Upload many times
expected_result: Click 1 times --> open a window. Click one more time --> don't do anything because of this window opened

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check security of file: upload valid file
expected_result: Upload successfully. Display exact name of file

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check security of file: upload file that containt virus or some problem about security
expected_result: Display message that file not save. No upload

test_view_points.viewpoint: Upload file by drag and drop file
expected_result: Upload successfully. Display exact name of file

test_view_points.viewpoint: Delete file uploaded
expected_result: Delete file successfully. Click btn Import, display error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check selecting single file
expected_result: User can select only one file to upload

test_view_points.viewpoint: Change file that was uploaded before importing
expected_result: Import the latest file successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Upload empty file: no header, no data
expected_result: Upload successfully or display error messages (base on spec, maybe Check capacity when start uploading)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Upload empty file: header, no data
expected_result: Upload successfully or display error messages (base on spec, maybe Check capacity when start uploading)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check btn Import
expected_result: Btn is active when hover mouse

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check working of button without upload file
expected_result: Display message: import file

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check click btn Import many times
expected_result: Imported Data is not duplicated

test_view_points.viewpoint: Import valid file (type: csv, template and data are right)
expected_result: Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB

test_view_points.viewpoint: Import file wrong type: xls, doc...and unicode file: UTF8...
expected_result: Display error messages

test_view_points.viewpoint: Import wrong file that edited type to csv (exam: .doc --> .csv)
expected_result: Display error messages

test_view_points.viewpoint: Import true file that edited file type to other type (exam: .csv --> .doc)
expected_result: Display error messages

test_view_points.viewpoint: Import file that was imported
expected_result:
Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB
Or display warning message that file's already existed

test_view_points.viewpoint: Import larges file (file size <= Max)
expected_result:
Make sure uploading time within limits
Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check imported file with total rows <= max
expected_result: Upload and import file successfully and no timedout or slowly. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check imported file with total rows > max
expected_result: Display error messages that total of row is overed

test_view_points.viewpoint: Edit/ delete data that was imported
expected_result: Edit/ delete successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Multi users import file at the same time
expected_result: Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check name of imported file: long name, special character, japanese, thailand, vietnamese...
expected_result: Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Validate data in file that the same with fields in entered screen with some cases following: 
- <= min, < min 
- <= max, > max
- special text, no alphabet, Japanese full size/ half size, space before and after data
- format number: interger, decimal (use: , or .), negative, start with 0...
- cell: empty, all space
- duplicate data (row or some unique data) in file
- duplicate data with data in DB
expected_result:
Valid data: Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB
Invalid data: no import in DB and show the error data on result screen (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check import file that containt format of data
- bold, Italic, trickthrough
- fill color
- change text color
- wapt text
- formular
- font, size
- alignment
expected_result:
Valid data: Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB
Invalid data: no import in DB and show the error data on result screen (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check import file that containt format of file
- wrong field name
- wrong location of columns
- Miss/excess  column
- format style of cell/text: bold, fill color...
expected_result:
Valid data: Upload and import file successfully. Display exact data follow design. Update data into DB
Invalid data: no import in DB and show the error data on result screen (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check importing file csv on many browsers
expected_result: Import file successfully on browsers

test_view_points.viewpoint: Valid Activities while importing (change tab, open another function, close browser...)
expected_result: Import file successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Invalid Activities while importing (off internet)
expected_result: Stop import

description: Testing CSV export functionality including download behavior, file format validation, and handling various export scenarios

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check btn Export
expected_result: Btn is active when hover mouse

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click btn many times
expected_result: Each clicking this btn, file will be downloaded

test_view_points.viewpoint: Download valid file
expected_result: Download file successfully. Display exact name format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Download valid file many times
expected_result: Download file successfully. Display exact name format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Download larges file
expected_result: Download file successfully. Display exact name format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Download file that no data
expected_result: Download file successfully or Display message that file no data and don't download file (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Multi users download file at the same time
expected_result: Download file successfully. Display exact name format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check file format of File
expected_result: Display exact format the same spec: CSV, UTF8.. (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check content of file download
expected_result: Display exact data with fields that match with set condition

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check download file csv on many browsers
expected_result: Download file successfully on browsers

test_view_points.viewpoint: Valid Activities while downloading (change tab, open another function, close browser...)
expected_result: Download file successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Invalid Activities while downloading (off internet)
expected_result: Stop downloading
